"'''Nine'''" was the designated name given to [[Mara Jade Skywalker]]'s [[R9-series astromech droid]]. The droid was used aboard her [[StealthX]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] during the height of the [[Swarm War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
